criteria.description: Infrastructure lint reports zero issues with the repository golangci-lint configuration.
criteria.evidence: From infrastructure/: GOWORK=off golangci-lint run --config ../.golangci.yml ./... returned 0 issues.
criteria.notes: The pinned golangci-lint v2.10.1 was installed to C:\Users\jones\go\bin for validation.

criteria.description: Infrastructure tests compile and run where local dependencies are available.
criteria.evidence: From infrastructure/: GOWORK=off go test ./... ran all packages; all non-Redis packages passed, while redis tests failed because no Redis service was listening on localhost:6379.
criteria.notes: The remaining test failure is an environment dependency, not a compile or lint failure introduced by this mission.

criteria.description: Profiling helpers no longer perform direct profiling environment reads and pprof has explicit server timeouts.
criteria.evidence: Reviewed infrastructure/profiling/pprof.go, infrastructure/profiling/pyroscope.go, and infrastructure/config/loader.go after merge.
criteria.notes: Existing StartPprofServer and StartPyroscope APIs remain source-compatible.

criteria.description: Infrastructure tests use external _test packages where required.
criteria.evidence: rg -n "^package .+$" infrastructure -g "*_test.go" shows all infrastructure tests use *_test packages.
criteria.notes: Private-helper tests in elasticsearch were rewritten through public NewClient behavior.

negative_invariants.description: Do not change lint policy to make issue #646 pass.
negative_invariants.verification_command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (git diff --name-only 20bf6739..HEAD -- .golangci.yml infrastructure/.golangci.yml) { exit 1 } else { exit 0 }"
negative_invariants.evidence: No lint policy files were changed after the mission merge.
